name: io.github.goldentrii/novada-mcp
description: Search the web (5 engines), extract content from any URL, crawl websites, map site structure, and run multi-step research — routed through 100M+ proxy IPs across 195 countries with anti-bot bypass.

tools.name: novada_search
tools.description: Search the web via Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Yahoo, or Yandex with structured results

tools.name: novada_extract
tools.description: Extract main content, title, description, and links from any URL

tools.name: novada_crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website (BFS/DFS) and extract content from multiple pages

tools.name: novada_map
tools.description: Discover all URLs on a website without extracting content

tools.name: novada_research
tools.description: Multi-step web research with parallel queries, deduplication, and citations

environmentVariables.name: NOVADA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Novada API key from https://www.novada.com
